channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Poppy Says She Was ‘Unable to Breathe’ Amid Wildfire Smoke at Upheaval Festival
item.description: Poppy’s fiery performance at Upheaval Festival had everyone breathless! 🔥🌬️ #Poppy #UpheavalFestival #MusicNews

item.title: Jennifer Finch, L7 Bassist and Los Angeles Punk Figure, Dies at 59
item.description: Rock on in power, Jennifer Finch 🤘🎸 Your punk spirit will live on forever! #RIPJenniferFinch #RockLegend

item.title: Noah Kahan Concert Among Shows Canceled in New York Due to Inclement Weather on Saturday
item.description: ☔️ Rain or shine, we'll dance another time! No worries, Noah Kahan fans, we'll catch those tunes soon! 🎶 #MusicNews #StayDry

item.title: Matty Healy & Gabbriette’s Wedding Rehearsal, With a Cute Dip-Kiss, Spotted in Paparazzi Video
item.description: Love is in the air! 💕🎶 Matty Healy & Gabbriette rehearse their wedding dance with a swoon-worthy dip-kiss! #RelationshipGoals

item.title: Crash Of Rhinos Play First Show In 13 Years
item.description: Guess who's back? 🦏🎶 Crash Of Rhinos hit the stage after 13 years! Let's rock out together! ✨ #CrashOfRhinosFever
